text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to start training, but Gold Ship is
nowhere to be found.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I head out to look for her along the beach.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Come one, come all! Welcome, welcome!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Get your fresh yakisoba here! Complete with rich
tangy sauce!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inexplicably, Gold Ship is selling yakisoba out of
a beach house.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My head is filled with question marks, but I
decide to ask what she's doing. But before I can...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. One serving of yakisoba, please.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: One yakisoba, comin' up! Oh, hey Flash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing before me is Eishin Flash, a focused,
by-the-books Umamusume from Germany.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Gotta say, I'm surprised that you of all people
would order yakisoba, the junkiest of junk food.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I figured you'd prefer a balanced lunch built into
a literal food pyramid or something.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've received many recommendations to enjoy
summer to the fullest extent.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Taking a page out of everyone's book, I
concluded yakisoba to be the best starting place.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I love the way you think! You know what? I'm
gonna throw in some extras for free!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Behold! Tangy yakisoba topped with fried
tempura bits and slathered with a heaping serving
of roe mayo!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Th-the calories! I can almost see them... So this is
what real summer yakisoba is like!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! One bite will get you hooked, guaranteed.
Go on, try it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Then, if you'll excuse me, I'll go eat this
at once!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wait until Eishin Flash leaves the window to
approach, but I'm once again foiled.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heeellooo! Yakisoba, please and thanks!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! You want pickled ginger with th―

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan comes to the window. She's got a
bit of a valley girl vibe, but more chill.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ughhh. That's totally my line. Like, what're you even doing here?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Answering the call of my soul, which is one with
yakisoba. My mind is constantly thinking of
yakisoba, so it's only natural my body is too.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you just want plain noodles, yeah? No
sauce or shredded cabbage or nothing?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, excuse you! I haven't even said anything yet!
Just... gimme a normal one.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Here! Take yer diabolically spicy habanero and
Carolina Reaper yakisoba special, and get outta
here!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: My what now?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There's no way this is the regular! Like, this looks like a plate of lava!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bwahahaha! That's the thing with you normies! I
drink lava for breakfast!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What? Are you too chicken to take a bite?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you are? I'll eat it for you if you can't take
the heat. Well? What'll it be?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, you're such a little...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I could totally eat this if I wanted to! Here, I'll
prove it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Go ahead. If you can clean the bowl, I'll give you shaved ice on the house! If you eat it all, that is!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bwahaha! I wish I could see her face after the first
bite! Just picturing it is so much fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All right, who's ne―oh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. You itching for a crack at the
regular too?
choice_data_list: Actually, I'm here for you. Time to train!
Actually, I'm here for you. Time to train!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You can't be serious. Just look at this beautiful
yakisoba weather.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I'm not budging an inch from this place!
For today's the day to sell yakisoba!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Gold Ship sells yakisoba until
the sun goes down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Business was booming! I'm completely sold
out.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The nice old guy who owns this place should be
all better by tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out she was standing in for the shop
owner because he had thrown out his back.
choice_data_list: You sure had a lot of customers.
You sure had a lot of customers.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. Yakisoba's junk food for the soul.
Nobody can resist it, young or old.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if Flash and Jordan cleaned their plates.
Hehe!
choice_data_list: Are you close with those two?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm Golshi, the most lovable of lovable pals, yeah? People all over the world adore me, so I'm sure they love me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But yeah, Flash is a great gal, no doubt about it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
She's always on top of things. She even writes
down all the dates for homework and tests and
lets me know about them.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't stop me from forgetting right away,
but still.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
As for Jordan... She just brings out the most
contrary side of me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I see her, I think stuff like, "I wonder
how she'd react if I flicked her forehead... ♪
Teehee!" Y'know, that kind of thing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And the rebellious kid inside me keeps cheering,
"Do it, do it!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't put my finger on it, but Gold Ship seems to
like Eishin Flash and Tosen Jordan in her own
way.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, but time sure flies. Summer vacation's
almost over already, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I really wanna rope Jordan into something
the next time I bump into her...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, what do you think's a good
summery thing to drag her into?
choice_data_list: You could go for a long swim together.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Splitting watermelons, huh? I guess it is the
hallmark of summer.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The green rind splits, red juice scatters, and black
seeds dance in the air...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Control is the key when it comes to smashing
open watermelons. One misstep, and it'll burst
into smithereens.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's good! Watermelon smashing's the
perfect way for me to show off my expert bat
swinging skills!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Go on a long swim? Ah, I see. You mean we
should go deep-sea fishing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Standing on a rocking boat for hours on end is a
great way to strengthen the legs and build
character.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Who knows? If we're out there long enough,
Jordan might build so much character that she
turns posh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's it! Next time I see her, I'm taking her
out on a ship to go tuna fishing!
